pr.title: ⚡ LegacyFix: 5375 lines modernized by Replit Agent
pr.body:
## ⚡ LegacyFix — Automated Legacy Code Modernizer

> Generated by [LegacyFix](https://legacyfix.replit.app) powered by Replit Agent

### Summary
- **7 files** modernized
- **5375 lines** updated
- Review changes before merging

### What was changed
# ⚡ LegacyFix Report

**Repository:** `bottlepy/bottle`
**Generated:** 2026-05-02 15:46 UTC
**Total lines modernized:** 5375
**Files changed:** 7

## Changes

| File | Lines Changed | Modernization | Security Notes |
|------|--------------|---------------|----------------|
| `bottle.py` | 4463 | 🐍 Python 2→3 | pickle.load() can execute arbitrary code from untrusted data; SHA1 is cryptographically weak |
| `test/test_mdict.py` | 2 | 🐍 Python 2→3 | — |
| `test/test_multipart.py` | 705 | 🐍 Python 2→3 | — |
| `test/test_outputfilter.py` | 197 | 🐍 Python 2→3 | — |
| `test/tools.py` | 5 | 🐍 Python 2→3 | — |
| `test/test_wsgi.py` | 2 | 🐍 Python 2→3 | — |
| `test/test_route.py` | 1 | 🔒 Security Fix | eval() is dangerous — arbitrary code execution risk |

## What LegacyFix does

| Fix Type | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| 🐍 Python 2→3 | Converts print statements, exception syntax, dict methods, string formatting |
| ⚡ JS Modernize | Replaces `var` with `const`/`let`, converts callbacks to arrow functions |
| 🔒 Security | Flags MD5, SHA1, eval(), Math.random(), SQL injection patterns |

## Review Checklist

- [ ] Review each file diff before merging
- [ ] Run your test suite
- [ ] Check security flagged lines manually
- [ ] Merge when confident ✅
